name: xclaw
description: xClaw - AI Agent Platform with Gateway architecture, drag-and-drop workflow builder, and multi-channel support

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/skills && npm run build -w packages/gateway && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.release:patch: npm run build && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm run publish:all
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm run publish:all
scripts.release:major: npm run build && npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && npm run publish:all
scripts.publish:all: npm publish -w packages/shared --access public && npm publish -w packages/core --access public && npm publish -w packages/skills --access public && npm publish -w packages/gateway --access public && npm publish -w packages/cli --access public
